name: Beef Rhapsody in Blue En Croute
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a 1-inch deep gash in the top of each fillet.
2. Brown the fillets in oil for 1 minute on each side. Drain.
3. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, and paprika. Set aside.
4. On a lightly floured board, roll each pastry out to an 8-inch circle.
5. Brush the top of each circle with egg. Reserve the remainder of the egg.
6. Mash the blue cheese with butter, chives, and garlic.
7. Press the mixture into the gash in each fillet.
8. Place a fillet in the center of each pastry. Bring the pastry up around the meat and pinch together at the top in an attractive manner.
9. Place on an ungreased baking sheet. Brush with the reserved egg and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
10. Bake at 400 degrees for 20 minutes, until the pastry is golden brown.
11. Remove to a platter and garnish with parsley, green onions, turnips, and carrots cut into pretty shapes. Makes 4 servings.
